resources.string: Instant Lockdown channel for foreground service notification
How long do you want to lock your phone?
Instant Lockdown is designed to help you focus and combat digital distractions. It allows you to instantly lock your phone for a set period of time.
Before you can lockdown your phone instantly. You need to setup few things.
Instant Lockdown allows you to lock your phone instantly. It also features a nighttime lockdown from 21:30 to 01:30.
You cannot cancel the lock once started.
"You need to enable autostart to always keep the app available to monitor activity screen. "
"Please click the button below to open the autostart settings. "
Then enable the autostart for this app.
"You need to enable autostart for showing lock widget everytime phone turned on. "
"Please click the button below to open the autostart settings. "
Then enable the autostart for this app.
You are being denied and bonked from entering your phone
Let me put you to safe place for some time ok. please close your app in mean time
Woah your going incognito my friend
You might encounter some neuron buster incognito like that. Here, let me put you to safe place.
Throw away your phone, and have a good night
It\'s been harsh there. Let\'s take a break from taking to much arousal
Sorry, please enable the accessibility service to continue using the app
Instant Lock Keeps You From Provoking Content

This app is designed to prevent prolonged exposure to arousing or NSFW content. If you find yourself in such situation and need to fight back this app will help you help escape without the need to move your finger.
Instant Lock Will Lock Your Phone Instantly
You wont be able to use your phone for several minutes if you happen to encounter NSFW or arousing content. The app will monitor your screen activity and lock your phone if it detects such content.
You better not do anything suspicious long incognito, or you\'ll be bonked from this phone!
You are being denied from this phone!
"You wandered too far and too 'fun'. You'll being bonked from this phone!\n\n Punishment time remaining: "
You don\'t have storage permission, please grant it to continue using the app
Please turn off accessibility service, the app will help to turn it back on later
You\'re going 1 hour lockdown with 30 second gap time between lockdown. Are you sure
This permission needed to show lock notification dialog each time lockdown triggered
This permission needed to obtain screen activity and delete it right after it being monitored
This permission needed to gain lock control access of your device, so app can lockdown the device automatically if it detects inappropriate content
This permission needed to gain service access for monitoring screen activity
Without Autostart Instant Lockdown cannot provide content monitoring to you if device is restarted. Please make sure to grant this autostart before continue

This app requires permission to monitor your screen using Android's Accessibility Service. With this access, the app can:

• Check screen content every 5 seconds
• Detect sexual or NSFW material in real time
• Temporarily lock your device when such content is detected, giving you a moment to step away
• Monitor incognito browsing activity and lock the screen if it's used for too long
• Help reduce overexposure to harmful or distracting content
• Work entirely on your device — nothing is sent online or stored externally

To enable these protective features, please grant the permission on the next screen.

This app needs Device Admin permission to help you avoid exposure to sexual content. With this access, the app can:

• Lock the device immediately after detecting sexual or NSFW content
• Prevent further usage and encourage mindful breaks
• Help reinforce your commitment to reducing harmful screen time
• Use this permission only to lock the device — never to track, wipe, or control other settings

Without this permission, the app cannot take action when inappropriate content is detected.

If you're serious about restricting access during vulnerable moments, please enable this permission on the next screen
